title: Risks
questions: What is the biggest risk that you have ever taken?
Do your parents enourage you to take risks? Why or why not?
Who among your friends is the biggest risk taker? Why do you say that?
Generally who take more risk boys or girls? Why do you think that?
What kind of person do you think is a bigger risk taker?
What other characteristics do risk takers have I common?
What sports/activities do you think are dangerous? Why?
What kind of job do you thnk is the most dangerous? Why?
What is risky about going to a foreign country?
Do you think people nowadays or in the past take more risks?
